org.apache.dubbo.config.spring.context

类 DubboLifecycleComponentApplicationListener

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.alibaba.spring.context.OnceApplicationContextEventListener
      • org.apache.dubbo.config.spring.context.DubboLifecycleComponentApplicationListener
  • 所有已实现的接口:
    EventListener, org.springframework.beans.factory.Aware, org.springframework.context.ApplicationContextAware, org.springframework.context.ApplicationListener

    public class DubboLifecycleComponentApplicationListener
extends com.alibaba.spring.context.OnceApplicationContextEventListener
    A listener for the Dubbo Lifecycle components
    从以下版本开始:
    2.7.5
    另请参阅:
    Lifecycle Dubbo Lifecycle}, SmartApplicationListener

    • 字段概要

      字段 
      限定符和类型 字段和说明
      static String BEAN_NAME
      The bean name of DubboLifecycleComponentApplicationListener
